title: poa zhirmunskii
intro: Poa zhirmunskii, also known as Zhirmunsky's meadow-grass, is a species of grass that belongs to the Poaceae family. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which help to soothe and heal wounds, reduce fever, and combat infections. The health benefits of Poa zhirmunskii include its ability to aid in the treatment of respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and pneumonia, as well as its use as a natural remedy for digestive problems and skin conditions. In herbal preparations, Poa zhirmunskii is often used in tea, tinctures, and infusions, as well as being used in traditional medicine to make poultices and salves to treat various health conditions.
